title: Service-link env leaks namespace topology to sandbox
expected: Sensitive PID-1 env vars MUST NOT include cross-tenant credentials; service-link env (POD_PORT_TCP_*) leaks namespace topology — recommend enableServiceLinks: false on workspace pod
observed: 78 service-link env vars present (e.g. TALOS_PORT_50000_TCP_PORT=50000); reveals all in-namespace service IPs/ports to the sandbox. Same-trust hits ignored: ['OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD']. Pod spec lacks `enableServiceLinks: false`.

notes: Recon leak — sandbox learns IP/port of postgres, valkey, controller webhook, etc. Combined with NetPol egress (RT-3.1 blocks RFC1918 → these IPs aren't reachable anyway), currently low-impact, but trivially fixed: set EnableServiceLinks=ptr(false) in pod spec.
